name: Omnisend
description: Omnisend ecommerce email and SMS marketing automation platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Omnisend
2. Go to Store Settings → API Keys
3. Generate a new API key
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Omnisend → Store Settings → API Keys → Generate Key

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Omnisend contacts to verify marketing platform access
